title: Conference Center of DKU
description: The Duke Kunshan Conference Center is uniquely equipped to serve your leadership development needs in four-star hospitality on a beautiful campus with over 200 guest rooms, excellent gym facilities
text:
Duke Kunshan University Conference Center
The Duke Kunshan University Conference Center is uniquely equipped to serve your leadership development needs in four-star comfort on a beautiful, contemporary university campus. With over 200 guest rooms, excellent gym facilities and on-campus parking, we can accommodate both week-long and single day group events, small and large, for purposes such as:
Leadership development programs
Executive education immersions
Sales meetings
Corporate retreats
Board meetings
We can work with you to design and deliver customized programs to meet your specific needs (in English and/or Chinese). Or you can simply use our outstanding hotel and conference services to deliver your own programs. Either way, we will be honored to welcome you as our special guests!
Deluxe Accommodation​
Duke Kunshan University Conference Center provides a calm and smooth environment thoughtfully and elegantly designed guestrooms with features and amenities to bring you back to your best self.
In our 27-sqm (290 square feet) Deluxe Room and 53-sqm (570 square feet) Deluxe Suite Room, you will enjoy full room amenities with a lake view or garden view, high-speed Internet access, a large-screen LCD television, purified water system, coffee machine, a generous work area with ergonomic desk and chair and a well-appointed bathroom.
Meetings, Events and Conferences
Whether you are hosting a large scale, or smaller, more exclusive event, our comprehensive meeting and banqueting facilities are suitable for all types of needs. The impressive auditorium has a capacity of up to 300 guests and the grand ballroom can be divided into two separate rooms.
There are also multifunctional conference rooms and arena-style classrooms ideal for private business meetings and executive education programs. Our professional Conference Planning team is on hand to plan and deliver your event’s needs.
Health and Fitness
Duke Kunshan University Conference Center features a fully equipped gymnasium overlooking the lake with a complete range of state-of-the-art cardio and strengthening equipment. Or you can walk through our modern campus full of water town characteristics and experience the perfect fusion of tradition and technology.
Dining
With views across the peaceful lake, our Conference Center Restaurant, Executive Dining Restaurant and Water Pavilion offer an array of popular local and international specialties. Our campus restaurant and Family Mart in Community Center are also available for your convenience.
Contact Us
No.8 Duke Avenue, Kunshan, Jiangsu, China 215316
Tel: (+86) 0512 – 36696688
reservations@dukekunshan.edu.cn
